name: @absolutejs/onchain
description: Tasteful, optional on-chain provenance for AbsoluteJS apps: earn → gasless, soulbound, seed-is-asset collectibles with real editions. Provider-agnostic; ships a working local adapter, real chains via @absolutejs/onchain-adapters.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts src/adapter-kit/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
